site.title: Sweet Spot Bakery
site.description: Artisan bakery serving handcrafted pastries and fresh bread since 2019
site.author: Sweet Spot Bakery

props.text: Baked with Love, Served with Joy
Every morning we craft artisan sourdough, buttery croissants, and seasonal pastries using locally sourced ingredients from Oregon farms.

props.alt: Warm bakery interior with fresh bread on display

props.title: Artisan Sourdough
props.description: 48-hour fermented sourdough made with organic stone-milled flour.

props.title: French Pastries
props.description: Buttery croissants, pain au chocolat, and seasonal fruit tarts baked fresh every morning.

props.title: Custom Celebration Cakes
props.description: Wedding cakes, birthday creations, and corporate events. Every cake is designed by hand.

content.heading: Fresh From Our Oven
content.subheading: Handcrafted every morning with locally sourced ingredients

props.quote: The sourdough here is the best in Portland.
props.author: Maria Santos

props.quote: They made the most beautiful wedding cake for us.
props.author: James & Kate Liu

props.quote: We order pastry platters for every team meeting. Sweet Spot never disappoints.
props.author: Rachel Kim

content.heading: From Our Regulars
content.subheading: Hear why Portland keeps coming back

props.text: Open Tuesday through Sunday, 7 AM to 4 PM. Walk-ins welcome, or order ahead.

content.heading: Our Story in Numbers
content.subheading: Six years of baking with heart

props.text: 2026 Sweet Spot Bakery. Handcrafted with love in Portland, OR.

specs.northStar:
# North Star: Sweet Spot Bakery

## Vision
Become Portland's most beloved neighborhood bakery by combining artisan craft with modern convenience.

## Success Metrics
- 2,500+ weekly customers by Q4 2026
- 4.8+ average Google rating
- 40% of orders placed online

## Core Value Proposition
Handcrafted baked goods using 100% locally sourced Oregon ingredients, available for walk-in and online ordering.
specs.sadd:
# SADD: Sweet Spot Bakery Website

## Architecture
Static site generated from Hey Bradley MasterConfig (AISP v1.2).

## Stack
- Frontend: React + Vite
- Styling: Tailwind CSS
- Deployment: Vercel
- CMS: Hey Bradley config-driven

## Sections
7 sections: navbar, hero, features, testimonials, CTA, numbers, footer.
specs.buildPlan:
# Build Plan

## Phase 1: Landing Page (Week 1-2)
- Configure sections via Hey Bradley
- Select wellness theme with dark mode
- Add bakery imagery and copy

## Phase 2: Online Ordering (Week 3-4)
- Integrate Square for payments
- Add menu page with categories

## Phase 3: Launch (Week 5)
- Custom domain setup
- SEO optimization
- Analytics integration
specs.features:
# Features Spec

## F1: Hero Section
- Overlay variant with background image
- Primary and secondary CTAs
- Trust badge showing customer count

## F2: Menu Showcase
- 3-column image card grid
- Sourdough, Pastries, Cakes categories

## F3: Social Proof
- 3 testimonial cards with ratings
- Customer name and role attribution

## F4: Call to Action
- Online ordering CTA
- Hours and visit information
specs.humanSpec:
# Sweet Spot Bakery Website

A beautiful, dark-themed landing page for Sweet Spot Bakery in Portland, OR. The site showcases their artisan breads, French pastries, and custom cakes with rich photography and customer testimonials. Visitors can see the menu, read reviews, and order online. The design uses a warm green palette that evokes natural, organic ingredients.

SPEC: complete

guidelines.voice: Warm, inviting, artisanal. Use sensory language about fresh ingredients and handcrafted quality.
